purpose: Standalone stylesheet for the IDE Problems Panel (diagnostics display). Defines .problems-panel container, empty state (centered icon + text), summary bar with filter toggles (errors/warnings/info severity counts), and per-problem row styling with file + line + message + severity icon. Hard-coded dark VS Code-like palette (#1e1e1e, #cccccc, #666 for empty state).
gotchas: DUPLICATE: ide-debug.css ALSO defines .problems-panel styles (lines 206-416 there). The two may diverge.
Component imports it via ProblemsPanel.jsx (which actually imports ide-debug.css instead — verify Vite dedupes by path or file content).
patterns: Empty state: flex center with min-height:60px and muted icon.
